news_headline: Weekly Gaza casualties: 23 Palestinians killed and 112 injured in the last week of June
news_summary: UN OCHA reported 23 Palestinians killed and 112 injured between 24 and 30 June 2026 in Gaza, citing the Gaza Ministry of Health.
citation_text: OCHA's 3 July 2026 Humanitarian Situation Report documents 23 Palestinians killed, 1 body retrieved, 1 person died of wounds, and 112 injured between 24 and 30 June, citing MoH figures.

news_headline: Fifth-grade child dies from airstrike injuries near a learning space
news_summary: A fifth-grade child died from injuries sustained during an airstrike on 23 June near a temporary education learning space in Gaza.
citation_text: OCHA reported that a fifth-grade child died from injuries sustained during an airstrike on 23 June near a temporary education learning space.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-003; child_flag set in persons per_003.

news_headline: 17-year-old girl killed on way to high school exam
news_summary: A 17-year-old girl was killed by Israeli forces on her way to sit for a high school exam in the West Bank.
citation_text: OCHA reported that Israeli forces killed three Palestinians (including one child) during raids and search operations in the West Bank between 23 and 29 June.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-004; child_flag set in persons per_004.

news_headline: 1,109 Palestinians killed in the West Bank since 7 October 2023
news_summary: Cumulative OCHA-recorded figure: 1,109 Palestinians (at least 243 children) killed in the West Bank including East Jerusalem between 7 October 2023 and 29 June 2026.
citation_text: UNRWA Situation Report #229: 1,109 Palestinians (at least 243 of them children) killed in the West Bank including East Jerusalem between 7 October 2023 and 29 June 2026.

news_headline: 1,053 fatalities recorded in Gaza since ceasefire despite continued strikes
news_summary: Cumulative figure from the 10 October 2025 ceasefire through 30 June 2026: 1,053 fatalities and 3,406 injuries from continued airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire.
citation_text: UNRWA Situation Report #229: 1,053 fatalities and 3,406 injuries recorded from continued Israeli airstrikes, shelling, and gunfire despite the ceasefire.

news_headline: Aid logistics driver killed on Kerem Shalom to Gaza warehouse route
news_summary: A driver working for a World Central Kitchen logistics partner was killed by Israeli forces while transporting aid goods in an access-restricted area.
citation_text: OCHA oPt Humanitarian Situation Report covering 29 June - 5 July 2026: a WCK logistics partner driver was killed while transporting aid goods in an access-restricted area.
notes: Linked to verified event EVT-029; entity ENT-P1-05 World Central Kitchen.

news_headline: Four-month-old infant dies after delayed transfer at Ramallah road gate
news_summary: A four-month-old Palestinian infant's transfer to hospital was delayed at an Israeli-staffed road gate near Ramallah; the infant later died at the hospital.
citation_text: OCHA oPt Humanitarian Situation Report covering 29 June - 5 July 2026: movement restrictions at an Israeli-staffed road gate near Ramallah delayed a four-month-old infant's hospital transfer.

news_headline: Over 9,000 chickenpox cases recorded across 130 Gaza health facilities
news_summary: Deteriorating environmental conditions and overcrowding drove more than 9,000 chickenpox cases across 130+ health facilities in Gaza in two weeks.
citation_text: OCHA reported that in just two weeks, over 9,000 cases of chickenpox were recorded across more than 130 health facilities in Gaza.
